query:
SELECT p.id, p.code, p.title, COUNT(w.id) as work_count 
FROM phases p 
LEFT JOIN works w ON w.phaseId = p.id 
GROUP BY p.id, p.code, p.title 
ORDER BY p.sortOrder;
command:

FROM phases p 
LEFT JOIN works w ON w.phaseId = p.id 
GROUP BY p.id, p.code, p.title 
ORDER BY p.sortOrder;
